title: Kanmunne Eththanai Nilavu Song Lyrics Thulluvadho Ilamai
stanzas: <div>Kanmunne Eththanai Nilavu Song Lyrics Thulluvadho Ilamai

Kanmunne eththanai
nilavu kaalaiyile
color color-aai
eththanai pookkal saalaiyile

yen udambilum
udambilum maatram
en thalai mudhal
kaal varai yaekkam

paruvam endraal
eriya vendum kadhalile

vayathukku vantha penne
vaadi munne
ilavasamaai tharuven
enthan idhayam thaane

vali enbathu ini thaane
adhu kooda sugamthaane
oru murai thaan
urasi podi paarvaiyile

adi fifteen ponadhu
sixteen vanthadhu
thavani parthen
meesai vanthadhu
thadavi paarthen parkal
irundhathu munnaale.

irakkam illaiyo
un idhazh thanthaal
en idhazhinil sirai pidippen

kaalam pidithiruppen

un thagappan thimiraiyum

nee enadhu arugil nindraale

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kanmunne Eththanai Nilavu?

The song explores themes of youthful love and longing, capturing the emotions of transformation and desire.

Who composed the music for Thulluvadho Ilamai?

The music for Thulluvadho Ilamai was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

What is the release year of Thulluvadho Ilamai?

The movie Thulluvadho Ilamai was released in 2002.

Who are the singers of Kanmunne Eththanai Nilavu?

The song is sung by Timmy and Yuvan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kanmunne Eththanai Nilavu is a poignant melody from the film Thulluvadho Ilamai, capturing the essence of youthful romance and the transformative power of love. The song beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and desire, as the protagonist reflects on the changes love brings to his life. Yuvan's music, combined with Timmy's soulful rendition, creates a nostalgic and melancholic atmosphere. The lyrics by Pa Vijay add depth, making it a memorable piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced the pangs of first love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kanmunne Eththanai Nilavu from Thulluvadho Ilamai captures the essence of youthful longing and romance. Yuvan's soulful composition paired with Timmy's evocative vocals creates a mesmerizing melody that resonates with the heart. Dive into this nostalgic journey and experience the magic of love and transformation.
stanzaMeanings: In front of my eyes, how many moons, in the morning, how many colorful flowers on the street.
In my body, there is a change from head to toe, a longing.
Youth means it must burn in love.
Girl who came of age, come forward, I will freely give you my heart.
Pain is now, but it is also a pleasure, just once, in a glance.
Is there no mercy? If you give your lips, I will capture them with mine.
If you give your hand, I will hold time with my hand.
Secretly wanting to see her face, a girl must be born for work, she must be there at the right age.
A girl's love has many tricks, here many girls' love is new.
He asked for a little gold, I want a treasure of gold.
Girl who came of age, come forward, I will freely give you my heart.
Pain is now, but it is also a pleasure, just once, in a glance.
In youth, along with education, love is needed, I will go to places without wind.
If a girl is in front of me, I will live with my eyes closed.
I will take your father's stubbornness, I have solved your mother's scolding, I will take your brother and sister-in-law, if you stand by me.
Girl who came of age, come forward, I will freely give you my heart.
Pain is now, but it is also a pleasure, just once, in a glance.
Is there no mercy? If you give your lips, I will capture them with mine.
If you give your hand, I will hold time with my hand.
